mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pr_wechat_order WHERE out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM pr_wechat_order WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into pr_transaction_record( id, house_id, receivable, preferential, paid_in, record_time, bill_num, serial_num, charge_serial, payment_balance, recharge_balance, is_charge, is_finished, payment_method1, payment_money1, payment_method2, payment_money2, del_flag, trade_type, trade_sources, charge_time, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{houseId}, #{paidIn}, '0.0000', #{paidIn}, NOW(), #{billNum}, #{transactionId}, #{transactionId}, '0.0000', '0.0000', '1', '0', '008', #{paidIn}, '000', '0.0000', '0', '1', 'WX_GZH_PAY', NOW(), #{openId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: update pr_expense set paid_in = #{paidIn}, final_money = #{paidIn}, is_charged = 1, charge_time = NOW(), record_id = #{recordId}, update_by = #{openId}, update_time = NOW() where house_id = #{houseId} and year = #{year}
